pageTitles.privacyPolicySubtitle: Data Protection Statement of MRB Fund Partners AG

sections: Data Protection Statement of MRB Fund Partners AG
Version effective as of 01 February 2025
With this Data Protection Statement we, MRB Fund Partners AG (hereinafter "MRB Fund Partners", we or us), describe how we collect and further process personal data.
This Privacy Notice is aligned with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), the Swiss Data Protection Act (DPA) and the revised Swiss Data Protection (revDPA).
1. Controller / Data Protection Officer / Representative
The controller of data processing is MRB Fund Partners AG, Fraumunsterstrasse 9, CH-8001 Zurich, info@mrbpartner.ch.
2. Collection and Processing of Personal Data
We primarily process personal data obtained from clients, business partners, public sources and website usage where legally permitted.
3. Purpose of Data Processing and Legal Grounds
We process personal data to provide services, fulfill contracts, comply with legal obligations, and where necessary on the basis of consent or legitimate interests.
4. Cookies / Tracking and Other Techniques Regarding the Use of our Website
We use cookies, analytics and similar technologies to operate and improve our website and communications.
5. Datatransfer and Transfer of Data Abroad
Data may be transferred to service providers and group entities in Switzerland and abroad, including Europe and the USA, with appropriate safeguards.
6. Retention Periods for your Personal Data
We retain personal data as long as required for contractual performance, legal obligations, documentation and legitimate business interests.
7. Data Security
We apply appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data from unauthorized access and misuse.
8. Obligation to Provide Personal Data To Us
Where required for a relationship or service, you must provide personal data; otherwise services or contracts may not be possible.
9. Profiling and Automated Individual Decision-Making
We may process data in part automatically (profiling) to improve communication, advisory quality and relevance of information.
10. Your Rights
Subject to applicable law, you have rights including access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection and data portability.
11. Amendments of this Data Protection Statement
We may update this statement at any time; the current website version applies.

regulatoryNotice.title: Regulatory Notice
